race.description: Xxxx Gold Colts, Geldings And Entires (Bm70) Hcp
race.comment: The penny has dropped for SAINT ALDWYN (4) who has won three of four since joining the new stable and gets some weight off with the 2kg claim. Can continue the rich vein of form. BLUEPINOT (3) is one from one around this circuit and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. In the mix from the champion Waller yard. LIBERTY STEPS (1) is a usually reliable type who ran well below his best last start when 4.5 lengths back in tenth over 1300m at Rockhampton. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and can give backers a sight. GIAPPONESE (8) returns from a lay-off. Recent trial winner at Grafton. Opened last campaign with a second at Grafton over 1400m. Include.
